scripts.check-types: bun run check-types:api; API_EXIT=$?; bun run check-types:ui; UI_EXIT=$?; if [ $API_EXIT -ne 0 ] || [ $UI_EXIT -ne 0 ]; then bun -e "console.log('Type errors found')"; exit 1; fi; bun -e "console.log('No type errors found')"
scripts.check-types:api: bun -e "console.log('Type checking backend...')" && bunx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json
scripts.check-types:ui: bun -e "console.log('Type checking frontend...')" && bunx tsc -b src/frontend/tsconfig.app.json src/frontend/tsconfig.node.json
